instruction: Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.
input: An issue has been discovered in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions before 15.5.7, all versions starting from 15.6 before 15.6.4, all versions starting from 15.7 before 15.7.2. A race condition can lead to verified email forgery and takeover of third-party accounts when using GitLab as an OAuth provider.
output: The impact of this vulnerability could include unauthorized account access, where the attacker gains control over third-party accounts linked through OAuth due to email address spoofing. This undermines account integrity and confidentiality.
